productDisplayName: Nike Men Prowl White Casual Shoes
description: Get ready to take on the outdoors in style in these Prowl shoes from nike. The sleek design of these shoes makes it possible to pair them with jeans and t-shirts for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic upper for protection and durabilityPerforations on the toebox and sides for greater breathability Lace-ups for a snug, customised FitCushioned collar and mesh tongue for greater comfort and ample ventilationMildly cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort Brand name on the tongue and collarEmbroidered brand logo on the sidesMidsoleRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticDynamic support system to adapt to your strideOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for maximum grip and tractionPivot points on the big toe mound and heel, coupled with circular and square lugs to offer a smooth rideshoe careDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust and dirt with a dry clean cloth
